zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Weston於1410年10月8日出生在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓時，他的父親John Weston32歲，母親Anne Walsh28歲。他於1435年與Agnes Dawney結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1516年享年106歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Weston于1410年10月8日出生在英国林可爾史爾波斯頓时，他的父亲John Weston32岁，母亲Anne Walsh28岁。他于1435年与Agnes Dawney结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1516年享年106岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Weston was born on 8 October 1410, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, his father, John Weston, was 32 and his mother, Anne Walsh, was 28. He married Agnes Dawney in 1435. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1516, at the age of 106.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Weston est né le 8 octobre 1410, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Weston, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne Walsh, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Dawney en 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1516, à l’âge de 106 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Weston am 8. Oktober 1410 in Boston, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Weston 32 und seine Mutter Anne Walsh 28. Er hat 1435 Agnes Dawney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1516 im Alter von 106 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Weston è nato il il 8 ottobre 1410 nel Boston, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, John Weston, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Anne Walsh, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Dawney nel 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1516, all'età di 106 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Weston(이)가 1410년 10월 8일 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Weston(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Walsh(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1435년 Agnes Dawney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1516년 106세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Weston nasceu em 8 de outubro de 1410, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Weston, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne Walsh, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Dawney em 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1516, com 106 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Weston родился 8 октября 1410 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Weston было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Walsh, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Dawney в 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1516 г. в возрасте 106 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Weston nació el 8 de octubre de 1410, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Weston, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anne Walsh, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agnes Dawney en 1435. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1516, a la edad de 106 años.
